metadata.title: Demo Widget Aggregate with Commands and Events

story.iWant: a simple Widget aggregate with CQRS commands and events
story.soThat: I have a working example demonstrating the CQRS pattern

tasks.task: Write Axon Test Fixtures tests (success + validation failures)
Commit: "Add Widget aggregate demonstrating CQRS pattern"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Widget.kt aggregate with WidgetId value object
Command handlers in Widget aggregate with business logic validation
Event sourcing handlers for state reconstruction
Axon Test Fixtures tests for all command scenarios (success and validation failures)

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: CQRS/Event Sourcing pattern with command handlers, event sourcing handlers, and state reconstruction.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: @Aggregate annotation. @CommandHandler for command processing. @EventSourcingHandler for state reconstruction. AggregateLifecycle.apply() for event emission.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Widget.kt aggregate with WidgetId value object. Commands: Create/Update/Publish. Events: Created/Updated/Published. Command handlers with validation. Event sourcing handlers. Axon Test Fixtures.

doc.title: Test Strategy
doc.snippet: Given-When-Then syntax. Event-driven assertions. Validation failure testing. fixture.givenNoPriorActivity().when(command).expectEvents(event).

module.name: products/widget-demo
module.purpose: Reference CQRS aggregate demonstrating Widget domain

file.purpose: Base class for all aggregates (from Epic 1.7)
file.snippet: abstract class AggregateRoot<ID : Identifier>(open val id: ID)
interface DomainEvent { val eventId: UUID, val occurredAt: Instant }

dependency.name: axon-test
dependency.usage: Axon Test Fixtures for aggregate testing

constraints.constraint: NO wildcard imports - Every import must be explicit
Use Axon Test Fixtures ONLY - Never mock aggregates
Test execution <10 seconds for unit tests
Business logic in command handlers (validation before apply)
State reconstruction in event sourcing handlers (no business logic)

interface.name: Widget Aggregate
interface.signature: @Aggregate class Widget { @AggregateIdentifier val widgetId: WidgetId, @CommandHandler constructor(CreateWidgetCommand), @EventSourcingHandler on(WidgetCreatedEvent) }
interface.purpose: CQRS aggregate demonstrating command handling and event sourcing
interface.usage: Reference pattern for all future aggregates

pattern.name: Axon Test Fixtures Pattern

standards.approach: Given-When-Then BDD style with Axon fixtures

ideas.idea: Test WidgetId value object extends Identifier
Test WidgetCreatedEvent, WidgetUpdatedEvent, WidgetPublishedEvent extend DomainEvent
Test CreateWidgetCommand with valid name emits WidgetCreatedEvent
Test CreateWidgetCommand with blank name throws ValidationException
Test UpdateWidgetCommand on published widget throws exception
Test PublishWidgetCommand on unpublished widget succeeds
Test PublishWidgetCommand on published widget throws exception
Test event sourcing handler reconstructs widgetId from WidgetCreatedEvent
Test event sourcing handler updates name from WidgetUpdatedEvent
Test event sourcing handler sets published=true from WidgetPublishedEvent
Test all command scenarios with Axon Test Fixtures (success paths)
Test all validation failures with Axon Test Fixtures (expect exceptions)
Measure test suite execution time and assert <10 seconds
Verify all classes have KDoc documentation
